name: macOS enterprise CIS-lite compliance
description: CIS-style Level 1 baseline derived from the macOS Enterprise Dashboard.

checks.title: FileVault disk encryption
checks.remediation: Enable FileVault in System Settings > Privacy & Security.

checks.title: System Integrity Protection
checks.remediation: Do not disable SIP. Boot to Recovery and run: csrutil enable.

checks.title: Gatekeeper enabled
checks.remediation: Run: sudo spctl --master-enable.

checks.title: Application Firewall enabled
checks.remediation: Enable Firewall in System Settings > Network > Firewall.

checks.title: Firewall stealth mode
checks.remediation: Run: sudo /usr/libexec/ApplicationFirewall/socketfilterfw --setstealthmode on.

checks.title: Automatic security updates
checks.remediation: Enable automatic security updates in Software Update settings.

checks.title: Critical updates auto-install
checks.remediation: Enable critical update installation in Software Update settings.

checks.title: Automatic update check
checks.remediation: Enable automatic update checks in Software Update settings.

checks.title: Remote Login SSH disabled
checks.remediation: Run: sudo systemsetup -setremotelogin off.

checks.title: Auto-login disabled
checks.remediation: Disable auto-login in System Settings > Users & Groups.

checks.title: Screen lock with password
checks.remediation: Enable password requirement after screen saver or display sleep.

checks.title: Screen lock delay max 5 minutes
checks.remediation: Set display sleep or screen lock timeout to 5 minutes or less.

checks.title: Guest account disabled
checks.remediation: Disable the Guest account in System Settings > Users & Groups.

checks.title: Login window shows name and password fields
checks.remediation: Run: sudo defaults write /Library/Preferences/com.apple.loginwindow SHOWFULLNAME -bool true.

checks.title: File Sharing disabled
checks.remediation: Disable File Sharing in System Settings > General > Sharing.

checks.title: Screen Sharing disabled
checks.remediation: Disable Screen Sharing in System Settings > General > Sharing.

checks.title: Remote Management disabled
checks.remediation: Disable Remote Management in System Settings > General > Sharing.

checks.title: AirDrop disabled
checks.remediation: Set AirDrop to No One in Finder > Go > AirDrop, or enforce via MDM.

checks.title: MDM enrolled
checks.remediation: Enroll the device via Apple Business Manager or your MDM server.

checks.title: Device supervised
checks.remediation: Re-enroll via Apple Business Manager DEP for supervision.
